title: St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai
tagline: St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai is a much-loved spiritual town in Tamil Nadu, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Stephen's Shrine is a Roman Catholic church dedicated to Saint Stephen, located in the village of Kombuthurai in the Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu, India. The church was built by St. Francis Xavier in May 1544.

topPlaces.name: Khutba Periya Palli, Kayalpattinam
topPlaces.description: The Khutba Periya Palli, also known as the Al Jami'ul Kabeer (Tamil: குத்பா பெரிய பள்ளி, காயல்பட்டினம், romanized: Grand Jumu'ah Masjid, lit. 'Big Juma Mosque') and as the Periya Khutba Palli, is a Friday mosque, located in Kayalpattinam, in the Thoothukudi district of the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kayalpatnam
topPlaces.description: Kayalpatnam (also known as Kayal) is a town in the Thoothukudi district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kayalpatnam (also spelled Kayalpattinam) is a historic coastal town in the Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Arumuganeri
topPlaces.description: Arumuganeri is a panchayat town at Tiruchendur constituency from Thoothukudi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. In ancient times, the town was part of the Kuda Nadu division led by Korkai.

topPlaces.name: Punnaikayal
topPlaces.description: Punnaikkayal (called Punicale by the Portuguese), is a harbour city in Tamil Nadu, India. Punnaikkayal seems to have been the main Portuguese possession on the southern Coast of India for a period of 50 years after their arrival from 1551, when they established 2 hospitals, a seminary, and the next year a mud fort.

topPlaces.name: Athur, Thoothukudi
topPlaces.description: Authoor is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Thamirabarani River
topPlaces.description: The Thamirabarani or Tamraparni or Porunai is a perennial river that originates from the Agastyarkoodam peak of Pothigai hills of the Western Ghats, above Papanasam in the Ambasamudram taluk. It flows through Tirunelveli and Thoothukudi districts of the Tamil Nadu state of southern India into the Gulf of Mannar.

topPlaces.name: Virapandianpatnam
topPlaces.description: Virapandianpattanam or Virapandianpatnam is a village on the southeastern coast of the Indian peninsula, near Thiruchendur, Thoothukudi District, Tamil Nadu. Many people were converted to Roman Catholicism there by St.

topPlaces.name: Kanam, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Kanam is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (134 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (130 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai?
faq.a: Stays in St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Stephen's Church, Kombuthurai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Khutba Periya Palli, Kayalpattinam, Kayalpatnam, Arumuganeri, Punnaikayal, Athur, Thoothukudi.
